description_long: This is a low-profile, armored combat vehicle with a sloped front glacis and a long, forward-facing cannon integrated into the hull. The vehicle features a set of continuous tracks on both sides, with visible road wheels and return rollers, indicating its tracked mobility. The upper hull is equipped with two long radio antennas, a roof-mounted machine gun, and several hatches and periscopes for crew access and visibility. The rear of the vehicle displays engine access panels, exhausts, and additional stowage compartments. The exterior is finished in a matte olive drab color, with minimal visible markings and no apparent camouflage pattern. The overall design suggests a focus on low silhouette, frontal armor protection, and direct-fire capability.
description: A low-profile, tracked armored combat vehicle with a sloped front, long cannon, and matte olive drab finish. Features include roof-mounted antennas, a machine gun, and multiple hatches.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped glacis, centrally mounted cannon, and two long antennas rising from the roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length of the cannon, the continuous tracks, and side-mounted tools and equipment.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals engine access panels, exhausts, and stowage compartments, with the cannon visible above the hull.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the machine gun mount on the roof, track system, and additional side details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon integrated into the hull front, one roof-mounted machine gun mount, both clearly visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with pronounced sloped front glacis, thick side and rear panels, and reinforced hatches; no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid matte olive drab color; no camouflage pattern visible.
